identity.name: Shivdhara Charitable Trust

buttons.primary: bg-[#8B1E1E] text-white hover:bg-[#701616] px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F7F1E6] text-[#8B1E1E] border border-[#8B1E1E]/20 hover:bg-[#EFE5D5] px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#8B1E1E] text-[#8B1E1E] hover:bg-[#8B1E1E] hover:text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-all

cards.feature: bg-white p-8 rounded-xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all group
cards.donation: bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border-t-4 border-[#8B1E1E] shadow-lg

hero.alt: Happy children in rural education program

medical.alt: Doctor examining patient at medical camp

bilingual_strategy.instructions: All text components must accept a 'lang' prop or use a context hook to switch between English and Gujarati content. Ensure Gujarati font 'Noto Sans Gujarati' is loaded.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'LanguageContext' to manage global language state (en/gu).
Use the 'Noto Sans Gujarati' font from Google Fonts for all Gujarati text.
Ensure the 'Donate' button is always visible and prominent (Sticky or in Header).
The 'Impact' section should use the Bento grid layout defined in layout settings.
Forms (Contact, Donation) must be bilingual - labels change based on selected language.
Footer must display Trust Registration No, 80G, 12A, and FCRA details clearly.
Do not use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic NGO content in English and Gujarati.
For the 'Success Stories', use an asymmetrical layout with image on one side and text on the other, alternating per story.
Ensure high contrast for accessibility, especially for elderly donors.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' - no generic centered layouts without purpose.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
